arts.ttl: Preview: Las Palmas vs. Real Sociedad - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's La Liga clash between Las Palmas and Real Sociedad, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Las Palmas are now without a win in 12 matches after the draw at Celta Vigo last weekend. The home side's last victory in La Liga came on home soil back in December, a 1-0 win over Espanyol. Real So...
